bio.name: Jane Doe
bio.title: Full Stack Developer
bio.desc:
Hi! I'm Jane, a full-stack developer passionate about building clean, fast web applications. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful products.

I work primarily with React, Node.js, and Python. I am comfortable across the whole stack — from designing databases to polishing UI animations.

When I'm not coding, I enjoy hiking, reading science fiction, and contributing to open-source projects.

projects.title: Task Manager App
projects.learned: A full-stack task management application built with React and Node.js. Features include drag-and-drop task reordering, real-time collaboration via WebSockets, and a RESTful API with JWT authentication.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.learned: An interactive weather dashboard that fetches real-time data from the OpenWeatherMap API. Built with vanilla JavaScript and Chart.js to display temperature trends and 7-day forecasts with beautiful data visualisations.
projects.skills: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Chart.js, REST APIs

projects.title: ML Sentiment Analyser
projects.learned: A machine learning pipeline that classifies customer reviews as positive, negative, or neutral using a fine-tuned BERT model. Achieved 94% accuracy on the test set. Deployed as a Streamlit web app.

certs.title: AWS Certified Developer – Associate
certs.learned: Earned the AWS Certified Developer Associate certification, demonstrating proficiency in developing, deploying, and debugging cloud-based applications using AWS services such as Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, and API Gateway.
certs.skills: AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, CloudFormation, API Gateway

certs.title: Google UX Design Professional Certificate
certs.learned: Completed the Google UX Design Professional Certificate, covering the full design process from user research and wireframing to prototyping and usability testing. Built three end-to-end portfolio projects.
certs.skills: UX Research, Figma, Wireframing, Prototyping, Usability Testing

certs.title: Meta Front-End Developer Certificate
certs.learned: Completed Meta's Front-End Developer Professional Certificate covering React fundamentals, advanced JavaScript patterns, responsive design, and performance optimisation best practices.
certs.skills: React, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Performance Optimisation
